data_access_role_arn.description: ARN of the IAM role that grants permissions to access the input data for training the entity recognizer.

input_data_config.description: Configuration block specifying the S3 location of the input data required for the entity recognizer, including entity types and annotations.
input_data_config.type: list(object({data_format: optional(string),annotations: list(object({s3_uri: string,test_s3_uri: optional(string)})),augmented_manifests: list(object({annotation_data_s3_uri: optional(string),attribute_names: list(string),document_type: optional(string),s3_uri: string,source_documents_s3_uri: optional(string),split: optional(string)})),documents: list(object({input_format: optional(string),s3_uri: string,test_s3_uri: optional(string)})),entity_list: list(object({s3_uri: string})),entity_types: list(object({type: string}))}))

language_code.description: Specifies the language of the input data for the entity recognizer. Must be a supported language code, such as "en" for English.

model_kms_key_id.description: Specifies the AWS KMS key ID used to encrypt the custom entity recognizer model. Must be a valid KMS key ARN.

name.description: Defines the name of the custom entity recognizer; must be unique within the AWS Comprehend account.

tags.description: Key-value pairs for tagging the entity recognizer, used for identifying and organizing resources; keys and values must be strings.

timeouts.description: Defines the duration allowed for operations like create, read, update, and delete of the entity recognizer. Adjust based on expected operation time.

version_name.description: Specifies the name of the version for the entity recognizer, which must be unique within the recognizer and adhere to AWS naming constraints.

version_name_prefix.description: Defines the prefix for the version name of the entity recognizer, used to distinguish different versions within the specified recognizer.

volume_kms_key_id.description: Specifies the KMS key ID for encrypting the volume used during training. Must be a valid KMS key ARN.

vpc_config.description: Configuration details for the VPC, including subnets and security groups, required for the entity recognizer to access resources securely.
